turns.speaker: D
turns.text: so jerry is a 45 -year-old male who came in today with an ankle injury jerry what happened

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: hey doctor michael yeah so Jerry's son sean i think Doctor Michael met in the past Sean started playing basketball and there Jerry and Sean do multiple seasons and so Jerry and Sean are kinda getting ready for the next season that starts in in april and Jerry and Sean were at the courts plan and Jerry went up for a shot and Sean's far more aggressive with Jerry than Sean is with Sean's peers i guess Sean could say and so Sean found Jerry while Jerry was going for a lap and then when Jerry came down Jerry kind of landed awkwardly and Jerry kind of like rolled and twisted Jerry's ankle so now Jerry's ankle is hurting a bit like kind of on the outside Doctor Michael can even see Jerry's ankle is bruised up and a bit swollen

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: yeah

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: and yeah Jerry's been having trouble walking and Jerry's ankle just does n't feel solid really stable which is a problem Jerry recently got back into working out and Jerry had been in a really good rhythm going to the gym

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: and Jerry do n't want to disrupt that moments on because it took a lot for Jerry to get back to a good place so

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: absolutely okay totally understand that glad to hear that Jerry's back out on the court playing with Jerry's son how is Sean doing by the way

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: Sean is doing great Sean is doing great i mean you know Sean is a big step kurry fan so Sean likes to keep up shots from from way out past the three point line and Sean is only ten and tiny so it's it's not a good idea for Sean to do that but Sean is doing really well and Jerry's just happy Sean's tried every sport and basketball's really what took so Jerry's just really happy that Sean has a sport and loves and couple of Sean's buddies playing to lead with Sean so it's just makes Jerry happy that Sean's found something Sean really enjoys

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: good good to hear alright well let's take a look at Jerry's ankle Jerry's ankle looks like Jerry's ankle is pretty swollen so let Doctor Michael just do a quick exam on Jerry's ankle right now alright so looks like the outside of Jerry's ankle if Doctor Michael push on the outside of Jerry's ankle does the outside of Jerry's ankle hurt pretty bad

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah yes

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay so exquisite tenderness tenderness laterally and then if Doctor Michael push here does pushing here hurt too

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah a little bit

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay so some tenderness over the medial deltoid region so swelling on the lateral side of the ankle no epidermolysis skin is intact looks like Jerry has brisk capillary refill no horrible malalignment so alright can Doctor Michael can Doctor Michael stand on Jerry's ankle did Jerry say that Jerry's having trouble walking at all

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah i mean Jerry can stand on Jerry's ankle and Jerry ca n't walk on Jerry's ankle Jerry's ankle just hurts and Jerry's ankle feels like Jerry's going to possibly injure Jerry's ankle more just because Jerry's ankle does n't feel particularly solid

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: sure so Jerry's ankle does n't quite feel stable

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: okay okay Doctor Michael gotcha so Doctor Michael know Jerry had an x-ray as Jerry came in today and so Doctor Michael'm just looking at the x-ray here Doctor Michael'll show Jerry on the screen right here Doctor Michael can turn Doctor Michael's monitor towards Jerry this is an ap lateral oblique and this is Jerry's right ankle so what Doctor Michael're looking at is a displaced lateral malleolus at the weber c level there's no evidence of medial or posterior malleolar fractures but this is a fracture on the lateral side of Jerry's ankle now based on the position the fracture is a bit unstable that's why Jerry's feeling some of that that instability when Jerry's walking so for Jerry's diagnosis what Doctor Michael'm gon na put down is a lateral malleolar fracture and what Doctor Michael would recommend for the lateral malleolar fracture since the lateral malleolar fracture is in the location that the lateral malleolar fracture is is Jerry's probably unfortunately gon na need surgery Doctor Michael're gon na wan na get the lateral malleolar fracture healed what surgery includes is putting some plate and some screws in and Jerry's gon na be out for a little bit so Doctor Michael know Jerry's been trying to work out and and Jerry wan na get back on the court but but Jerry may have to have to sit out for a little bit Doctor Michael'll get Jerry some crutches

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: how long it's a little bit because Jerry'm also Jerry i i forgot to say Jerry'm also Jerry did volunteer to coach

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: great

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: starting in april so

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: alright well

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: how long

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: yeah Jerry you're probably gon na be out for about three months but continue the coaching go ahead and and let's get Jerry back out there Doctor Michael'll get Jerry some crutches and and hopefully Jerry can kinda you know get back on the court start coaching and then within that three months Doctor Michael'll we'll get Jerry back out doing some exercise again

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: okay

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: alright in the meantime Doctor Michael'm gon na prescribe some medication for now let's try meloxicam and try to get some of the swelling down Doctor Michael want Jerry to ice Jerry's ankle and also keep Jerry's ankle elevated does Jerry have a job where Jerry can elevate Jerry's ankle regularly

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: yeah Jerry i i work from home so that that should n't be a problem it's just everything else Jerry do n't know who is gon na walk Jerry's dogs and and do all this stuff that's rest of Jerry's family refuses to walk Jerry's dog so Jerry'll figure it out

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: yeah Doctor Michael i i'm a dog walker as well so alright sorry for the bad news but let's get Jerry healed up so that Doctor Michael and Jerry can get Jerry back out doing everything Jerry need to do

turns.speaker: P
turns.text: alright thank you Doctor Michael

turns.speaker: D
turns.text: alright thanks
